pages.title: About Holiday Kenya Safaris
pages.excerpt: How Holiday Kenya Safaris helps local travelers find and plan Kenya trips, and how Ashford Tours & Travel fits in.
pages.content:
Holiday Kenya Safaris helps travelers in Kenya browse domestic safaris, local excursions, coast experiences and group trips with the useful package details kept close at hand.

A practical route into a Kenya trip

Each Tour keeps its route, duration, itinerary and package notes in one place. You can compare the options first, then request a quote for your dates and group.

Operated by Ashford Tours & Travel

Holiday Kenya Safaris is operated by Ashford Tours & Travel. The relationship keeps the browsing experience focused on local travelers while the source itinerary and operator context stay traceable.

Start with the trip, not a blank message

Browse the Tour catalogue, open the trip that suits you, and use its quote action so the conversation begins with the right package context.

Browse all tours

pages.title: Group Travel in Kenya
pages.excerpt: A clear starting point for family, friends, corporate, community and school trip organizers.
pages.content:
Organizing for several people means balancing the route, dates, departure town, transport, accommodation and budget. Start with the group facts and a Tour you can point to.

Trips for different kinds of groups

Work and corporate groups

Share the purpose, headcount, preferred dates and departure town.

Chamas, churches and SACCOs

Keep the trip option and group requirements visible for the people coordinating the decision.

Schools and youth groups

Begin with the age group, headcount, dates, route and the practical information your organizer needs confirmed.

Family and friend groups

Share who is traveling, the date or month, departure town and the comfort level the group has in mind.

What to have ready

  • The Tour or destination you are considering.
  • Your preferred date or month.
  • The number of adults and children.
  • Your departure town.
  • Any transport, accommodation or budget preference that should shape the quote.
Choose a tour

pages.title: Contact Holiday Kenya Safaris
pages.excerpt: Contact-page draft awaiting the final public phone, email, address and business hours.
pages.content:
For a Tour quote, choose a trip first and use its request-quote action. That keeps the package, preferred date and group size together when the conversation begins.

Choose the relevant Tour

Open the catalogue, select the trip you are interested in, and share your details from that Tour page.

Browse all tours
